phase3_answer_with_citations: Acme maintains SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certifications, with annual third-party audits and NDA-gated report sharing [ID:1].
phase4_graph_context: Entity cluster: Acme -> Compliance Program -> SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, Annual Audit Cycle.

phase3_answer_with_citations: The standard SLA is 99.9% monthly uptime, includes service credits on breach, and requires critical incident acknowledgment within 1 business hour [ID:2].
phase4_graph_context: Relation chain: SLA -> Uptime Commitment -> Incident Response SLO -> Service Credit Policy.

phase3_answer_with_citations: Customer data is retained for 30 days after termination unless earlier deletion is requested; encrypted backups are retained for 35 days [ID:5].
phase4_graph_context: Policy subgraph: Data Retention Policy -> Deletion Window 30d -> Backup Retention 35d.

phase3_answer_with_citations: Typical implementation takes 4-6 weeks and includes discovery, ingestion, validation, and UAT with a delivery manager and solutions engineer [ID:3].
phase4_graph_context: Delivery graph: Implementation Plan -> Milestones -> Role Assignment.

phase3_answer_with_citations: Enterprise pricing starts at $6,000/month for up to 50 users, with $85/user/month overage and a one-time $12,000 onboarding fee [ID:4].
phase4_graph_context: Pricing graph: Plan Tier -> User Cap -> Overage Rate -> Onboarding Service Fee.

phase3_answer_with_citations: Acme supports Slack, Google Drive, and Microsoft 365 integrations, with Slack ingestion via OAuth and channel-level metadata persistence [ID:6].
phase4_graph_context: Integration graph: Connectors -> OAuth -> Metadata lineage by source channel.
